name: agent-memory-devtools
description: Inspectable, editable, replayable local memory for coding agents.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @agent-memory/shared && npm run build -w @agent-memory/memory-core && npm run build -w @agent-memory/api && npm run build -w @agent-memory/cli && npm run build -w @agent-memory/web
scripts.check: npm run build && npm test && npm run lint
